page_metadata.biotools__summary: Precise modelling and interpretation of bioactivities of ligands targeting G protein-coupled receptors | SED: Screening for Lasso of ECFPs and Deep Neural Nets | SED was developed to predict ligand bioactivities and to recognize key substructures associated with GPCRs through the coupling of screening for Lasso of long extended-connectivity fingerprints (ECFPs) with deep neural network training
